examples: Virga said 53% of the 2012 increase in global growth of refined copper supplies occurred in the fourth quarter.
Catherine Virga, director of CPM Group, said the consultancy had estimated an end-of-2010 Chinese inventory of at least 1.63 million tons.
Virga said if the Grasberg strike is extended again, an additional 15 to 24 million pounds of copper production could be lost.
